film.title: Joseph: King of Dreams
film.overview: In this animated retelling of the story from the Bible's Book of Genesis, Joseph's gift of dream interpretation and his brilliantly colored coat inspires jealousy in his brothers.

dialogues.dialogue: ♪ You've seen the damage Words can do ♪  This is God's plan.  ♪ When full Of thoughtless pride ♪  That's enough!  ♪ Now heed the wiser voice In you ♪

♪ You've got to give A little more than you take ♪  ♪ You've got to leave A little more than was here ♪  ♪ You may be prideful Of the strides you will make ♪  ♪ But keep one thing clear ♪  ♪ You're just a player In a much bigger plan ♪
